additions.gui.simpleclouds.config.customRainSounds: Specifies if new rain sounds should replace the vanilla ones.
additions.gui.simpleclouds.config.renderCustomRain: Specifies if custom rain rendering should be used. Automatically disabled when using Pretty/Particle Rain.
additions.gui.simpleclouds.error.coreShadersInitia: An error occured while initializing core shaders. If you are modifying them, please see the log for more details. If you are a user, please report this on the Simple Clouds GitHub.
additions.gui.simpleclouds.requires_reload_resourc: A config option was modified that requires resource packs to be reloaded. Would you like to reload resources to apply the changes?
